items.briefing:
Canvas, the widely used learning management system, has reportedly reached an "agreement" with hackers following a data breach — this is directly relevant to Australian registered training organisations and educational institutions using the platform. Staff and students whose data may be affected should stay alert for phishing emails or suspicious contact using their personal details.

Separately, Australian firms are being urged to strengthen ransomware defences as AI increasingly features in cyberattacks. Criminals are using AI to make scams and attacks faster and more convincing.

**Practical tip:** If your organisation uses Canvas, check with your IT team whether your data was affected and be cautious of unexpected emails asking you to click links or verify account details.
